SEARCH
Package Persistance

Interface ShopDAO

All Known Implementing Classes:
ShopApiDAO, ShopJsonDAO
public interface ShopDAO
The ShopDAO interface defines the contract for data access functionality related to managing shop data using JSON files.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    informDaoToCreate()
    Informs the DAO to create data when the shop data storage doesn't exist.
    boolean
    isShopInfoEmpty()
    Checks if the storage representing shop data is empty.
    ArrayList<Shop>
    readShops()
    Reads shop data from the storage and converts it into an ArrayList of Shop objects.
    boolean
    workingShopsDAO()
    Checks if the shop data file exists.
    void
    writeShops(ArrayList<Shop> shops)
    Writes the provided list of shops to the storage.

  • Method Details

    • workingShopsDAO

      boolean workingShopsDAO()
      Checks if the shop data file exists.
      Returns:
      true if the shop data file exists, false otherwise.

    • readShops

      ArrayList<Shop> readShops() throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Reads shop data from the storage and converts it into an ArrayList of Shop objects.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList of Shop objects read from the storage.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If there is an issue with the API during the data retrieval process.

    • writeShops

      void writeShops(ArrayList<Shop> shops) throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Writes the provided list of shops to the storage.
      Parameters:
      shops - The ArrayList of Shop objects to be written to the storage.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If there is an issue with the API during the data writing process.

    • isShopInfoEmpty

      boolean isShopInfoEmpty() throws edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException
      Checks if the storage representing shop data is empty.
      Returns:
      true if the storage is empty, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      edu.salle.url.api.exception.ApiException - If there is an issue with the API during the data retrieval process.

    • informDaoToCreate

      void informDaoToCreate() throws CreateDirectoryException
      Informs the DAO to create data when the shop data storage doesn't exist.
      Throws:
      CreateDirectoryException - If there is an issue creating the directory for the shop data storage.
